shot_notes: Panic and retreat; one warrior falls
evidence_summary: Establish the supernatural threat of the cave through auditory and psychological terror, forcing a chaotic retreat of the Apache warriors.

A group of Apache warriors approaches the cave entrance. They find the protagonist but are interrupted by a terrifying, low moaning sound emanating from the depths. The warriors flee in panic; one warrior falls to his death during the retreat.
From curiosity/investigation to primal terror and chaos.
apache_warriors approaching the cave entrance in a moonlight gorge.
chaotic retreat with one warrior falling from a height.
Warriors investigate, hear a supernatural moan, and flee in panic.
